verses.commentary: The Spirit clearly says points to prophetic revelation. That in later times some will abandon the faith predicts apostasy. And follow deceiving spirits and things taught by demons attributes false teaching to demonic origin. Not all error is innocent; some is spiritually malevolent.

Such teachings come through hypocritical liars identifies human agents. Whose consciences have been seared as with a hot iron describes moral numbness. Repeated sin cauterizes conscience until it no longer feels guilt.

They forbid people to marry and order them to abstain from certain foods specifies the false teaching: ascetic prohibitions. Which God created to be received with thanksgiving affirms creation's goodness. By those who believe and who know the truth qualifies recipients: believers with right understanding.

For everything God created is good establishes creation theology against dualism. And nothing is to be rejected if it is received with thanksgiving makes gratitude the key. Thanksgiving sanctifies creation's use, transforming mundane to sacred.

Because it is consecrated by the word of God and prayer shows how thanksgiving works. The word of God recalls Genesis 1: God spoke and it was good. Prayer acknowledges dependence and divine provision.

If you point these things out to the brothers and sisters gives Timothy instruction. You will be a good minister of Christ Jesus defines good ministry: teaching truth. Nourished on the truths of the faith and of the good teaching that you have followed links ministry health to personal spiritual diet.

Have nothing to do with godless myths and old wives' tales commands rejection of false teaching. Rather, train yourself to be godly contrasts with positive command. Godliness requires training like athletics: intentional, disciplined effort.

For physical training is of some value acknowledges limited benefit of bodily exercise. But godliness has value for all things elevates spiritual training above physical. Holding promise for both the present life and the life to come spans time and eternity. Godliness pays dividends now and forever.
This is a trustworthy saying that deserves full acceptance marks another creedal formula, likely referring to verse 8's statement about godliness. The saying merits complete belief.

That is why we labor and strive explains motivation. Because we have put our hope in the living God grounds effort in confidence. Who is the Savior of all people, and especially of those who believe makes God's saving role universal in provision but particular in application. God sustains all but saves believers.
Command and teach these things authorizes Timothy to instruct with authority. Both imperatives: command (order) and teach (explain) form complete ministry.

Don't let anyone look down on you because you are young addresses Timothy's youth as potential liability. But set an example for the believers in speech, in conduct, in love, in faith and in purity counters with positive command. Authority comes from exemplary life, not merely age. Five areas of modeling span word and deed.

Until I come establishes timeframe. Devote yourself to the public reading of Scripture, to preaching and to teaching lists three ministerial duties. Public Scripture reading maintains biblical centrality. Preaching applies Scripture. Teaching explains it.

Do not neglect your gift warns against disuse. Which was given you through prophecy when the body of elders laid their hands on you recalls Timothy's ordination. Gift came through prophecy and confirmation through laying on of hands. Spiritual gifts require cultivation, not merely possession.

Be diligent in these matters commands careful attention. Give yourself wholly to them requires total devotion. So that everyone may see your progress states purpose: visible growth validates ministry. Progress proves genuineness.

Watch your life and doctrine closely commands vigilance over character and teaching. Persevere in them requires endurance. Because if you do, you will save both yourself and your hearers shows stakes: salvation of self and others depends on faithful ministry. Not salvation by works but salvation through persevering in truth.
